# Vicrez Installer Directory

> Find professional body kit and widebody kit installers across the United States. A directory of 6,000+ verified and listed automotive customization shops maintained by Vicrez.

## About

The Vicrez Installer Directory is a free resource for car enthusiasts looking for professional body kit installation services. We maintain a nationwide database of automotive customization shops that specialize in body kit installation, widebody kit conversions, vinyl wraps, paint/bodywork, and performance modifications.

Verified installers have been confirmed through the Vicrez dealer network. Listed installers are sourced from publicly available business information and have not been independently verified.

## What We Offer

- **Installer Search**: Find body kit installers near any US zip code
- **Location Pages**: Browse installers by city and state (e.g., Houston TX, Los Angeles CA)
- **State Directory**: View all installers grouped by state
- **Installation Guides**: Expert articles on body kit installation costs, widebody kit installation process, and how to choose an installer
- **Verified Shops**: Installers confirmed through the Vicrez dealer network are marked as "Verified"

## Key Pages

- Homepage / Search: https://installers.vicrez.com
- Directory (all states): https://installers.vicrez.com/directory
- Guides Index: https://installers.vicrez.com/guides
- Body Kit Installation Cost Guide: https://installers.vicrez.com/guides/body-kit-installation-cost
- Widebody Kit Installation Guide: https://installers.vicrez.com/guides/widebody-kit-installation-guide
- How to Choose an Installer: https://installers.vicrez.com/guides/how-to-choose-body-kit-installer

## Body Kit Installation Cost Ranges (2026)

- Lip Kit Installation: $200–$800
- Front Bumper Kit: $500–$1,500
- Full Body Kit (unpainted): $800–$2,500
- Full Body Kit (with paint): $1,500–$4,000
- Widebody Kit (basic): $2,000–$5,000
- Widebody Kit (full conversion with paint): $3,000–$8,000+
- Carbon Fiber Kit: $1,500–$6,000+

## Coverage

- All 50 US states
- 6,000+ installer listings
- Verified and unverified tiers
- Services: body kits, widebody kits, vinyl wraps, paint/bodywork, performance mods, wheels/tires

## Parent Company

Vicrez (https://www.vicrez.com) — Premium automotive aftermarket parts including body kits, carbon fiber accessories, custom steering wheels, and more.

## API

- Installer data: https://installers.vicrez.com/api/installers (public, GET)
- Sitemap: https://installers.vicrez.com/sitemap.xml

## Contact

- Website: https://www.vicrez.com/contact-us
- B2B / Become a Dealer: https://b2b.vicrez.com
